title: Sedgwick Confirms Ransomware Data Breach
context: Claims management firm Sedgwick disclosed a breach at its government services subsidiary on January 4, 2026, after TridentLocker ransomware group claimed to have stolen 3.4 GB of data from an isolated file transfer system. The incident affects systems serving U.S. agencies like DHS, ICE, and CISA, but segmentation prevented wider impact; the company notified law enforcement and clients with no disruption to operations.
